---
title: "\'Mr. Valentine: A Sketch\'"
---

## \'Mr. Valentine: A Sketch\'

**Author:** ?Harriette Cheape
**Date:** 1890
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (June 1890) 527-540

### Notes

The story appeared under the name \'Joanna Harrison\' but it is apparent from CMY\'s correspondence with A. D. Innes that the author was a [[person: 289]Miss Cheape], perhaps Harriette Cheape.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
